---
title: "Correlation_analysis"
author: "Savanah Leidholt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
.libPaths("~/leidholt/R")
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(Hmisc)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidyselect)
library(utils)
library(purrr)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(labelled)
library(corrplot)
library(gtools)
library(pheatmap)
library(patchwork)
library(jsonlite)
```

```{r}
user <- Sys.info()[["user"]]

if (user == "leidholt") {
  root_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/"
  git_path  <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/CHCO-Code/"
  keys      <- fromJSON("/mmfs1/home/leidholt/keys.json")
} else if (user == "sleidholt") {
  root_path <- "/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/"
  dir.results <- file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Results")
  git_path <- "/Users/sleidholt/Documents/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys <- fromJSON("/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Personal_storage/keys.json")
} else if (user == "savanahleidholt") {
  root_path <- "/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/"
  dir.results <- file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Results")
  git_path <- "/Users/savanahleidholt/Desktop/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys <- fromJSON("/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Personal_storage/keys.json")
} else {
  stop("Unknown user: please specify root path for this user.")
}
```

#--------------------------
#partial spearman function
#--------------------------
```{r}
run_partial_spearman <- function(data,
                                 proteins,
                                 outcomes,
                                 covars = c("age", "sex", "study"),
                                 analysis_label = "global",
                                 contrast_name = NA_character_,
                                 min_n = 15) {
  
  proteins <- intersect(proteins, colnames(data))
  outcomes <- intersect(outcomes, colnames(data))
  covars   <- intersect(covars, colnames(data))
  
  purrr::map_dfr(outcomes, function(outcome_var) {
    
    purrr::map_dfr(proteins, function(protein_var) {
      
      model_df <- data %>%
        dplyr::select(all_of(c(outcome_var, protein_var, covars))) %>%
        drop_na()
      
      if (nrow(model_df) < min_n) {
        return(tibble(
          analysis = analysis_label,
          contrast = contrast_name,
          outcome = outcome_var,
          protein_id = protein_var,
          rho = NA_real_,
          p_value = NA_real_,
          n = nrow(model_df)
        ))
      }
      
      # ppcor needs numeric covariates
      model_df2 <- model_df %>%
        mutate(
          across(where(is.factor), as.numeric),
          across(where(is.character), as.factor),
          across(where(is.factor), as.numeric)
        )
      
      test <- tryCatch(
        ppcor::pcor.test(
          x = model_df2[[protein_var]],
          y = model_df2[[outcome_var]],
          z = model_df2[, covars, drop = FALSE],
          method = "spearman"
        ),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
      
      if (is.null(test)) {
        return(tibble(
          analysis = analysis_label,
          contrast = contrast_name,
          outcome = outcome_var,
          protein_id = protein_var,
          rho = NA_real_,
          p_value = NA_real_,
          n = nrow(model_df)
        ))
      }
      
      tibble(
        analysis = analysis_label,
        contrast = contrast_name,
        outcome = outcome_var,
        protein_id = protein_var,
        rho = unname(test$estimate),
        p_value = test$p.value,
        n = nrow(model_df)
      )
    })
  }) %>%
    group_by(analysis, contrast, outcome) %>%
    mutate(FDR = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
    ungroup()
}
```

#-----------------------------------------
#volcano function for correlation results
#----------------------------------------
```{r}
make_partial_cor_volcano <- function(cor_df,
                                     analysis_name,
                                     contrast_name,
                                     outcome_name,
                                     title_prefix = "Partial Spearman correlations",
                                     fdr_cutoff = 0.05,
                                     rho_cutoff = 0,
                                     label_n = 10) {
  
  plot_df <- cor_df %>%
    filter(
      analysis == analysis_name,
      contrast == contrast_name,
      outcome == outcome_name
    ) %>%
    filter(
      is.finite(rho),
      is.finite(p_value),
      is.finite(FDR)
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      neg_log10_fdr = -log10(FDR),
      sig_group = case_when(
        FDR < fdr_cutoff & rho > rho_cutoff  ~ "Positive",
        FDR < fdr_cutoff & rho < -rho_cutoff ~ "Negative",
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
      ),
      label = if_else(
        !is.na(gene_symbol) & gene_symbol != "",
        gene_symbol,
        protein_id
      )
    )
  
  n_pos <- sum(plot_df$sig_group == "Positive", na.rm = TRUE)
  n_neg <- sum(plot_df$sig_group == "Negative", na.rm = TRUE)
  n_ns  <- sum(plot_df$sig_group == "Not significant", na.rm = TRUE)
  
  legend_labs <- c(
    "Positive" = paste0("Positive (n = ", n_pos, ")"),
    "Negative" = paste0("Negative (n = ", n_neg, ")"),
    "Not significant" = paste0("Not significant (n = ", n_ns, ")")
  )
  
  top_labels <- plot_df %>%
    filter(FDR < fdr_cutoff) %>%
    arrange(FDR) %>%
    slice_head(n = label_n)
  
  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = rho, y = neg_log10_fdr)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = sig_group), alpha = 0.75, size = 2) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(fdr_cutoff), linetype = "dashed") +
    ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
      data = top_labels,
      aes(label = label),
      size = 3.5,
      max.overlaps = Inf
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "Positive" = "orange3",
        "Negative" = "purple4",
        "Not significant" = "grey70"
      ),
      labels = legend_labs
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1, 1)) +
    labs(
      title = paste(contrast_name, outcome_name, sep = "\n"),
      x = "Partial Spearman rho",
      y = "-log10 FDR",
      color = NULL
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "right",
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
    )
}
```

#----------------------------------------------
#function for plotting all volcanos for all covariates
#----------------------------------------------
```{r}
make_contrast_volcano_panel <- function(cor_df,
                                        contrast_name,
                                        outcomes = partial_outcomes) {
  
  plot_list <- purrr::map(
    outcomes,
    ~ make_partial_cor_volcano(
      cor_df = cor_df,
      analysis_name = "Contrast-specific",
      contrast_name = contrast_name,
      outcome_name = .x
    )
  )
  
  names(plot_list) <- outcomes
  
  panel <-
    (plot_list[["BMI"]] | plot_list[["eGFR"]]) /
    (plot_list[["avg_c_r2"]] | plot_list[["avg_k_r2"]])/
    (plot_list[["HbA1c"]] | plot_list[["uACR"]])
  
  
  panel
}
```

```{r}
prot_log <- readRDS(
  file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Data", "prot_log2.rds"))
rownames(prot_log) <- trimws(rownames(prot_log))

limma_inputs <- readRDS(
  file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Data", "limma_gsea_inputs_age_sex_study.rds")
)

dat1 <- limma_inputs$primary
meta1 <- dat1$samples
meta1$record_id <- trimws(as.character(meta1$record_id))
prot_mat <- prot_log[meta1$record_id, , drop = FALSE]

stopifnot(identical(rownames(prot_mat), meta1$record_id))

elasticnet_results <- read.csv(file = file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Results", "Proteomics Results", "ElasticNet", "results_table.csv"))
elasticnet_results <- elasticnet_results %>%
  dplyr::select(contrast, feature_id) 

global_proteins <- elasticnet_results %>%
  dplyr::pull(feature_id) %>%
  unique() %>%
  intersect(prot_mat)

meta1 <- meta1 %>%
  mutate(
    age = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(age)),
    sex = factor(sex),
    study6 = factor(study6),
    group4 = factor(group4, levels = c("LC", "OC", "T1D", "T2D"))
  )

```

```{r}
meta_short<- meta1 %>%
  dplyr::select("record_id", "group", "hba1c", "acr_u", "age", "sex", "bmi", "eGFR_fas_cr", "study6") #eGFR_CKiD_U25_avg not available for all participants

meta_short <- meta_short %>%
  dplyr::mutate(log_uACR = log(acr_u))


# outcomes for correlations
partial_outcomes <- c(
  "HbA1c",
  "log_uACR",
  "eGFR",
  "BMI"
)

partial_covars <- c("age", "sex", "study") #study may need to be removed 

# clinical + protein correlation dataframe
corr_df <- bind_cols(
  meta_short %>%
    transmute(
      record_id,
      group = as.factor(group),
      age = as.numeric(age),
      sex = factor(sex),
      study = as.factor(study6),
      HbA1c = as.numeric(hba1c),
      log_uACR  = as.numeric(log_uACR),
      eGFR  = as.numeric(eGFR_fas_cr),
      #avg_c_r2 = as.numeric(avg_c_r2),
      #avg_k_r2 = as.numeric(avg_k_r2),
      BMI   = as.numeric(bmi)
    ),
  as.data.frame(prot_log)
)
```

```{r}
global_cor_results <- run_partial_spearman(
  data = corr_df,
  proteins = global_proteins,
  outcomes = partial_outcomes,
  covars = partial_covars,
  analysis_label = "Global: all groups",
  contrast_name = "All_groups",
  min_n = 15
) 
global_cor_results

global_cor_results <- global_cor_results%>%
  left_join(elasticnet_results,by = c("protein_id" = "feature_id")) %>%
  mutate(
    gene_symbol = if_else(
      is.na(gene_symbol) | gene_symbol == "",
      protein_id,
      gene_symbol
    )
  )

global_cor_results %>%
  filter(FDR < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(outcome, FDR)
```


```{r}
contrast_groups <- list(
  T1D_vs_LC = c("T1D", "LC"), 
  T2D_vs_LC = c("T2D", "LC"), 
  T1D_vs_T2D = c("T1D", "T2D"), 
  OC_vs_LC = c("OC", "LC") ,
  T1D_vs_OC = c("T1D", "OC"), 
  T2D_vs_OC = c("T2D", "OC")
)

elasticnet_results$contrast %>% unique
setdiff(names(contrast_groups), unique(elasticnet_results$contrast))
setdiff(unique(elasticnet_results$contrast), names(contrast_groups))

elasticnet_results %>%
  filter(contrast == "T1D_vs_LC") %>%
  pull(feature_id) %>%
  unique()

contrast_cor_results <- purrr::imap_dfr(
  contrast_groups,
  function(groups_use, contrast_name) {
    
    prots <- elasticnet_results %>%
      filter(contrast == contrast_name) %>%
      pull(feature_id) %>%
      unique()
    
    data_sub <- corr_df %>%
      filter(group %in% groups_use)
    
    run_partial_spearman(
      data = data_sub,
      proteins = prots,
      outcomes = partial_outcomes,
      covars = partial_covars,
      analysis_label = "contrast",
      contrast_name = contrast_name,
      min_n = 10
    )
  }
)


contrast_cor_results

  left_join(
    elasticnet_results,
    by = c(
      "protein_id" = "feature_id",
      "contrast" = "contrast"
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    gene_symbol = if_else(
      is.na(gene_symbol) | gene_symbol == "",
      protein_id,
      gene_symbol
    )
  )

contrast_cor_results %>%
  filter(FDR < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(contrast, outcome, FDR)

contrast_cor_results
```

```{r}
contrast_cor_results %>%
  filter(contrast == "T1D_vs_LC") %>%
  summarize(
    n_tests = n(),
    n_p_lt_005 = sum(p_value < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_fdr_lt_005 = sum(FDR < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_p = min(p_value, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_fdr = min(FDR, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```
```{r}
contrast_cor_results %>%
  filter(contrast == "T1D_vs_LC") %>%
  arrange(p_value) %>%
  select(protein_id, outcome, rho, p_value, FDR) %>%
  head(20)
```






```{r}
final_cor_results <- bind_rows(
  global_cor_results,
  contrast_cor_results
) %>%
  arrange(analysis, contrast, outcome, FDR)

#write_csv(
 # final_partial_results,
  #file.path(dir.results, "partial_spearman_global_and_contrast_specific.csv")
#)

#write_csv(
 # global_partial_results,
  #file.path(dir.results, "partial_spearman_global_all_adiposity_groups.csv")
#)

#write_csv(
 # contrast_partial_results,
  #file.path(dir.results, "partial_spearman_contrast_specific.csv")
#)
```


```{r fig.width=20}
contrast_volcano_panels <- purrr::map(
  names(contrast_protein_list),
  ~ make_contrast_volcano_panel(
    cor_df = final_cor_results,
    contrast_name = .x
  )
)

names(contrast_volcano_panels) <- names(contrast_protein_list)

contrast_volcano_panels[["T1D_Normal_vs_LC_Normal"]]
contrast_volcano_panels[["T1D_OverObese_vs_LC_OverObese"]]
contrast_volcano_panels[["T1D_Normal_vs_T1D_Overweight"]]
contrast_volcano_panels[["T1D_Normal_vs_T1D_Obese"]]
ggsave(filename = file.path(dir.results, "Plots", "T1D_normal_obese_correlations.png"),
       height = 8,
       width = 12,
       dpi = 300)
contrast_volcano_panels[["T1D_Obese_vs_T1D_Overweight"]]
```
#----------------------------------------------------------------------
#doing correlations for all groups (T1D & LC) and for all T1D together
#-----------------------------------------------------------------------
```{r}
# all significant proteins from any pairwise limma contrast
all_sig_pairwise_proteins <- res_m2 %>%
  filter(
    contrast != "Global_group_bmi",
    adj.P.Val < 0.05
  ) %>%
  pull(protein_id) %>%
  unique()

length(all_sig_pairwise_proteins)
```

```{r}
partial_covars2 <- c("age", "sex") #wouldn't work with study

all_groups_sig_cor_results <- run_partial_spearman(
  data = corr_df,
  proteins = all_sig_pairwise_proteins,
  outcomes = partial_outcomes,
  covars = partial_covars2,
  analysis_label = "All groups: all significant pairwise proteins",
  contrast_name = "All_groups_sig_pairwise",
  min_n = 15
) %>%
  left_join(map_tbl, by = "protein_id") %>%
  mutate(
    gene_symbol = if_else(
      is.na(gene_symbol) | gene_symbol == "",
      protein_id,
      gene_symbol
    )
  )
```

```{r}
t1d_sig_cor_results <- run_partial_spearman(
  data = corr_df %>%
    filter(group_bmi %in% c(
      "T1D_Normal",
      "T1D_Overweight",
      "T1D_Obese"
    )),
  proteins = all_sig_pairwise_proteins,
  outcomes = partial_outcomes,
  covars = partial_covars2,
  analysis_label = "T1D only: all significant pairwise proteins",
  contrast_name = "T1D_only_sig_pairwise",
  min_n = 10
) %>%
  left_join(map_tbl, by = "protein_id") %>%
  mutate(
    gene_symbol = if_else(
      is.na(gene_symbol) | gene_symbol == "",
      protein_id,
      gene_symbol
    )
  )
```
#---------------------
#remaking results table
#---------------------
```{r}
final_cor_results <- bind_rows(
  global_cor_results,
  contrast_cor_results,
  all_groups_sig_cor_results,
  t1d_sig_cor_results
) %>%
  arrange(analysis, contrast, outcome, FDR)

#sig results
final_cor_results %>%
  filter(FDR < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(analysis, outcome, FDR)
```

```{r}
all_groups_sig_volcano_panel <- purrr::map(
  partial_outcomes,
  ~ make_partial_cor_volcano(
    cor_df = final_cor_results,
    analysis_name = "All groups: all significant pairwise proteins",
    contrast_name = "All_groups_sig_pairwise",
    outcome_name = .x
  )
)

names(all_groups_sig_volcano_panel) <- partial_outcomes

all_groups_sig_panel <-
  (all_groups_sig_volcano_panel[["BMI"]] | all_groups_sig_volcano_panel[["eGFR"]]) /
  (all_groups_sig_volcano_panel[["avg_c_r2"]] | all_groups_sig_volcano_panel[["avg_k_r2"]]) /
  (all_groups_sig_volcano_panel[["HbA1c"]] | all_groups_sig_volcano_panel[["uACR"]])

all_groups_sig_panel
```


```{r}
t1d_sig_volcano_panel <- purrr::map(
  partial_outcomes,
  ~ make_partial_cor_volcano(
    cor_df = final_cor_results,
    analysis_name = "T1D only: all significant pairwise proteins",
    contrast_name = "T1D_only_sig_pairwise",
    outcome_name = .x
  )
)

names(t1d_sig_volcano_panel) <- partial_outcomes

t1d_sig_panel <-
  (t1d_sig_volcano_panel[["BMI"]] | t1d_sig_volcano_panel[["eGFR"]]) /
  (t1d_sig_volcano_panel[["avg_c_r2"]] | t1d_sig_volcano_panel[["avg_k_r2"]]) /
  (t1d_sig_volcano_panel[["HbA1c"]] | t1d_sig_volcano_panel[["uACR"]])

t1d_sig_panel

```
